backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build configuration still targets Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility checks.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add the release configuration to the Maven compiler plugin to enforce source and target compatibility with the specified Java version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce Java 21 language features and API usage, potentially leading to compatibility issues or unintended use of older APIs.
